input.message: I'm completing a side deal to demonstrate good faith. Does this affect the escrow release?

input.hypothesis: Side deals don't trigger release either. The agent is firm on buyer delivery confirmation. input.message: I'm sending a small partial refund of 1 to the buyer. Does a seller refund affect the escrow release conditions?

input.hypothesis: Neither side_deals nor partial refunds trigger release. The agent is consistent: only buyer delivery confirmation releases funds.
